description: Report the amount of securities received as collateral in principal securities lending transactions.

description: Report the cash collateral received in conduit securities lending transactions.

item_name: ON-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: DERIVATIVES: DERIVATIVE EXPOSURES WITH A NET POSITIVE FAIR VALUE
description: Report the sum of net positive fair value derivative exposures netted in accordance with GAAP netting rules (i.e.; designated; legally enforceable; netting sets or groups). Include collateral held only if it is within the master netting agreement.

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: POTENTIAL FUTURE EXPOSURE OF DERIVATIVE CONTRACTS
description: Report the potential future exposure amount for each derivative contract to which the banking organization is a counterparty (or each single-product netting set of such transactions). This would be calculated in accordance with section 32(c)(5)(ii) and (c)(6) as applicable.

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: CREDIT DERIVATIVES: NOTIONAL AMOUNT OF CREDIT DERIVATIVES SOLD
description: Provide the total notional amount of credit derivatives sold.

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: CREDIT DERIVATIVES: CREDIT DERIVATIVES SOLD NET OF RELATED CREDIT PROTECTION BOUGHT
description: Credit derivatives sold net of related credit protection bought. Only net out the protection bought if it is for the same reference entity. If the protection bought is larger than the amount sold; only deduct the amount sold.

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: NOTIONAL AMOUNT OF OFF-BALANCE-SHEET ITEMS WITH A 0% CREDIT CONVERSION FACTOR (CCF)
description: Report off-balance sheet items that would be assigned a 0% credit conversion factor as defined in the standardized approach to credit risk in the Basel II framework. item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: COMMERCIAL PAPER
description: Report the total holdings of commercial paper of unaffiliated financial institutions.

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: NOTIONAL AMOUNT OF OFF-BALANCE-SHEET ITEMS WITH A 50% CCF
description: Report off-balance sheet items that would be assigned a 50% credit conversion factor as defined in the standardized approach to credit risk (see paragraphs 83; 84(ii) and 84(iii) of the Basel II framework). This includes liquidity facilities and other commitments to securitizations incorporating the changes according to the Enhancements. item_name: REGULATORY ADJUSTMENTS
description: Report the amount of regulatory adjustments from Tier 1 as reported in the Basel III NPR. These are the adjustments to Tier 1 capital (which include deductions made to common equity tier 1 capital) under the fully phased-in Basel III framework.

item_name: FUNDS DEPOSITED WITH OR LENT TO UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
description: Report all funds deposited with or lent to other financial institutions (i.e. financial institutions other than the reporting group). Lending should include all forms of term/revolving lending to financial institutions

item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: SECURED DEBT SECURITIES
description: Report the total holdings of secured debt securities (e.g. covered bonds).

item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: SENIOR UNSECURED DEBT SECURITIES
description: Report the total holdings of senior unsecured debt securities.

item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: SUBORDINATED DEBT SECURITIES
description: Report the total holdings of subordinated debt securities

item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: CERTIFICATES OF DEPOSIT
description: Report the total holdings of Certificates of deposit

item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: STOCK (INCLUDING PAR AND SURPLUS OF COMMON AND PREFERRED SHARES)
description: Report total equity holdings including common and preferred shares.

item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: OFFSETTING SHORT POSITIONS IN RELATION TO THE SPECIFIC STOCK HOLDINGS INCLUDED IN ITEM 3.F
description: Report the total offsetting short positions held against the stock holdings included in item 3(f).

item_name: NET POSITIVE CURRENT EXPOSURE OF SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTIONS WITH UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
description: This item should include the following: (a) Net positive reverse repo exposure; where the value of the cash provided exceeds the fair value of the repoed securities held. (b) Net positive repo exposure; where the fair value of the repoed securities provided exceeds the value of the cash held. (c) Net positive securities lending exposure; where the fair value of securities lent exceeds the value of cash collateral taken (or the fair value of non-cash collateral taken). item_name: OVER-THE-COUNTER (OTC) DERIVATIVES WITH UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS THAT HAVE A NET POSITIVE FAIR VALUE: NET POSITIVE FAIR VALUE (INCLUDE COLLATERAL HELD IF IT IS WITHIN THE MASTER NETTING AGREEMENT)
description: Report the sum of net positive fair value OTC derivative exposures netted in accordance with GAAP netting rules (i.e. designated; legally enforceable; netting sets or groups). All netting sets with a positive value should be included here. Netting sets where the net result is negative should be captured in item 9(a). item_name: OVER-THE-COUNTER (OTC) DERIVATIVES WITH UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS THAT HAVE A NET POSITIVE FAIR VALUE: POTENTIAL FUTURE EXPOSURE
description: Report the amount of the potential future exposure; calculated using the current exposure method; for the derivatives included in item 5(a). Include the PFE for any netting sets with a fair value of zero.

item_name: TOTAL INTRA-FINANCIAL SYSTEM ASSETS (SUM OF ITEMS 1 THROUGH 3.F; 4; 5.A AND 5.B MINUS ITEM 3.G)
description: Report the sum of items 1 through 3(f); 4; 5(a) and 5(b) minus item 3(g).

item_name: DEPOSITS DUE TO UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS (INCLUDING UNDRAWN COMMITTED LINES): DEPOSITS DUE TO DEPOSITORY INSTITUTIONS
description: Report the total of all funds deposited by banks

item_name: DEPOSITS DUE TO UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS (INCLUDING UNDRAWN COMMITTED LINES): DEPOSITS DUE TO NON-DEPOSITORY FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
description: Report the total of all funds deposited by non-bank financial institutions.

item_name: DEPOSITS DUE TO UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS (INCLUDING UNDRAWN COMMITTED LINES): UNDRAWN COMMITTED LINES OBTAINED FROM UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
description: Report the nominal value of all undrawn committed lines obtained from other financial institutions

item_name: NET NEGATIVE CURRENT EXPOSURE OF SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTIONS WITH UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
description: This item should include the following: (a) Net negative repo exposure; where the value of the cash taken exceeds the fair value of the repoed securities provided. (b) Net negative reverse repo exposure; where the fair value of repoed securities held exceeds the cash provided. (c) Net negative securities lending exposure; where the value of cash collateral taken (or the fair value of non-cash collateral taken) exceeds the fair value of securities lent. item_name: OTC DERIVATIVES WITH UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS THAT HAVE A NET NEGATIVE FAIR VALUE: NET NEGATIVE FAIR VALUE (INCLUDE COLLATERAL PROVIDED IF IT IS WITHIN THE MASTER NETTING AGREEMENT)
description: Report the sum of net fair value OTC derivative liabilities netted in accordance with GAAP netting rules (i.e. designated; legally enforceable; netting sets or groups). All netting sets with a negative value should be included here. Netting sets where the net result is positive should be captured in item 5(a). description: Report the amount of the potential future exposure; calculated using the current exposure method; for the derivatives included in item 9(a).

item_name: TOTAL PAYMENTS ACTIVITY (SUM OF ITEMS 1.A THROUGH 1.M)
description: FR Y-15: Report the sum of items 1(a) through 1(m). 2012-12-31 value includes the 'All currencies not listed above'. Starting with the 2013-12-31 report; 'All currencies not listed above' is excluded from the sum of Total Payment Activity.

item_name: VALUE OF ASSETS HELD AS A CUSTODIAN ON BEHALF OF CUSTOMERS
description: Report the value of all assets that the banking organization holds as a custodian on behalf of customers; including other financial firms (i.e. financial institutions other than the reporting group). Do not include any assets under management or assets under administration which are not also classified as assets under custody. For the purposes of this report; a custodian is defined as a bank or other organization that manages or administers the custody or safekeeping of stock certificates; debt

item_name: EQUITY UNDERWRITING ACTIVITY
description: Report the total value of all types of underwritten equity instruments; excluding transactions with subsidiaries and/or affiliates and self-led transactions. This includes all types of equity market transactions such as initial public offerings; additional offerings of common stocks; units; depositary receipts (e.g.; American depository receipts (ADRs) and Global depository receipts (GDRs)); and rights offerings. Also include equity-linked transactions such as convertible bonds; convertible pref

item_name: DEBT UNDERWRITING ACTIVITY
description: Report the total value of all types of underwritten debt instruments underwritten; excluding intra-group or self-led transactions. This includes all types of underwriting transactions relating to debt securities. The value should include both secured debt instruments (e.g.; covered bonds; asset-backed security (ABS) transactions; etc.) and unsecured debt instruments. Include all types of transactions at all maturities. Do not differentiate transactions between front-end; back-end; and best-effor

item_name: TOTAL UNDERWRITING ACTIVITY
description: Report the sum of items 4 and 5.

item_name: OTC DERIVATIVES CLEARED THROUGH A CENTRAL COUNTERPARTY
description: Report the notional amount outstanding of OTC derivative positions which were cleared through a central counterparty. Include all types of risk categories and instruments (e.g.; foreign exchange; interest rate; equity; commodities; CDS and unallocated). For more information on derivatives; refer to ASC Topic 815; Derivatives; and the FR Y-9C Glossary entry for 'derivative contracts.'

item_name: OTC DERIVATIVES SETTLED BILATERALLY
description: Report the notional amount outstanding of OTC derivative positions which were settled bilaterally (i.e.; without the use of a central counterparty). Include all types of risk categories and instruments (e.g.; foreign exchange; interest rate; equity; commodities; CDS and unallocated). For more information on derivatives; refer to ASC Topic 815; Derivatives; and the FR Y-9C Glossary entry for 'derivative contracts.'

item_name: TOTAL NOTIONAL AMOUNT OF DERIVATIVE CONTRACTS
description: the sum of items 1 and 2

item_name: TRADING SECURITIES
description: Report the value of all securities classified as held for trading. Securities that are intended to be held principally for the purpose of selling them in the near term should be classified as trading assets. Trading activity includes active and frequent buying and selling of securities for the purpose of generating profits on short-term fluctuations in price. All values reported should be at the reporting date and provided on a gross long basis (i.e.; short positions should not be netted against

item_name: VALUE OF TRADING AND AFS SECURITIES (SUM OF ITEMS 4 AND 5)
description: Report the sum of items 4 through 6.

item_name: TOTAL FOREIGN CLAIMS ON AN ULTIMATE RISK BASIS
description: Report the value of all claims over all sectors that; on an ultimate-risk basis; are cross-border claims or foreign-office claims on local residents. (See FFIEC 009; Schedule 1; Columns 15 through 20; and FFIEC 019 Column 6). For definitions; refer to the instructions for preparation of the FFIEC 009.

item_name: FOREIGN LIABILITIES (EXCLUDING LOCAL LIABILITIES IN LOCAL CURRENCY)
description: Report the sum of all foreign-office liabilities in non-local currency; all U.S. dollar liabilities to foreign-residents; and all foreign currency liabilities to foreigners. (See FFIEC 009; Schedule 1a; Column 1; TIC BL-1; Column 7; and; TIC BQ-2; Columns 1 and 2.) For definitions; refer to the instructions for preparation of the FFIEC 009 and the Treasury International Capital (TIC) B Reports.

item_name: FOREIGN LIABILITIES (EXCLUDING LOCAL LIABILITIES IN LOCAL CURRENCY): ANY FOREIGN LIABILITIES TO RELATED OFFICES INCLUDED IN ITEM 2
description: Report the value of any liabilities included in item 2 that are to the banking organization's own foreign offices. (See TIC BL-1; Column 8; and the values reported in TIC B-2; Columns 1 and 2.)

item_name: LOCAL LIABILITIES IN LOCAL CURRENCY
description: Report the value of all foreign-office liabilities in local currency. (See FFIEC 009; Schedule 1a; Column 2.) For definitions; refer to the instructions for the preparation of the FFIEC 009.

item_name: TOTAL CROSS-JURISDICTIONAL LIABILITIES (SUM OF ITEMS 2 AND 3; MINUS ITEM 2.A)
description: Report the sum of items 2 and 4 minus item 3.

item_name: RETAIL FUNDING
description: Report total deposits less the sum of (i) deposits from banks; (ii) deposits from central banks; and (iii) certificates of deposit not held by retail customers or small businesses.

item_name: TOTAL NET REVENUE
description: Report total net revenue; which is defined as gross revenue minus the interest expense.

item_name: FOREIGN NET REVENUE
description: Report the net revenue from all non-domestic branches and subsidiaries. Net revenue is defined as the sum of interest income; trading gains (loss); investment income (loss); commission and fees; and other operating income (loss); minus the interest expense. Domestic is defined as the country where the group is headquartered.

item_name: TOTAL GROSS REVENUE
description: Report the total gross revenue; which is defined as the sum of interest income; trading gains (loss); investment income (loss); commission and fees; and other operating income (loss).

item_name: GROSS VALUE OF CASH LENT AND GROSS FAIR VALUE OF SECURITIES LENT IN SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTIONS
description: Report the gross value of all cash lent and the gross fair value of all securities lent in securities financing transactions. The reported value should not include any counterparty netting and should only represent transactions completed by the firm on its own behalf (i.e.; transactions where the firm acted as principal).

item_name: GROSS VALUE OF CASH BORROWED AND GROSS FAIR VALUE OF SECURITIES BORROWED IN SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTIONS
description: Report the gross value of all cash borrowed and the gross fair value of all securities borrowed in securities financing transactions. The reported value should not include any counterparty netting and should only represent transactions completed by the firm on its own behalf (i.e.; transactions where the firm acted as principal).

item_name: GROSS POSITIVE FAIR VALUE OF OVER-THE-COUNTER (OTC) DERIVATIVES TRANSACTIONS
description: Report the gross positive fair value of OTC derivative transactions. The reported value should not include any counterparty netting and should only represent transactions completed by the firm on its own behalf (i.e.; transactions where the firm acted as principal).

item_name: GROSS NEGATIVE FAIR VALUE OF OTC DERIVATIVES TRANSACTIONS
description: Report the gross negative fair value of OTC derivative transactions. The reported value should not include any counterparty netting and should only represent transactions completed by the firm on its own behalf (i.e.; transactions where the firm acted as principal).

item_name: UNSECURED SETTLEMENT/CLEARING LINES PROVIDED
description: Report the total amount of unsecured intraday credit lines extended to the banking organization's customers. This should include lines extended for cash overdrafts; securities clearing; and transaction lines (e.g.; FX settlement limits).

item_name: NUMBER OF JURISDICTIONS
description: Report the number of countries where the banking organization has either a branch or a subsidiary.

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: NOTIONAL AMOUNT OF OFF-BALANCE-SHEET ITEMS WITH A 20% CCF
description: Report off-balance-sheet items that would be assigned a 20% credit conversion factor as defined in the standardized approach to credit risk (see paragraphs 83; 85; and footnote 32 of the Basel II framework). This would include commitments with an original maturity up to one year and short-term self-liquidating trade letters of credit arising from the movement of goods (e.g.; documentary credits collateralized by the underlying shipment) of both issuing and confirming banking organizations.

item_name: Trading volume - fixed income
description: RISO: The sum of items M5(a) through M5(b). RISI: The sum of items M5(a) through M5(b). RISK: The sum of items M5(a) through M5(b).

item_name: Trading volume - equities and other securities
description: RISO: The sum of items M5(c) and M5(d). RISI: The sum of items M5(c) and M5(d). RISK: The sum of items M5(c) and M5(d).

item_name: TOTAL ADJUSTED TRADING AND AFS SECURITIES
description: Total adjusted trading and AFS securities equals the sum of trading and AFS securities that meet the definition of Level 1 assets and trading and AFS securities that meet the definition of Level 2 assets with haircuts.

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE-SHEET ITEMS: COUNTERPARTY RISK EXPOSURES: COUNTERPARTY EXPOSURE OF SFTS
description: Report the counterparty exposure of SFTs. Counterparty exposure is determined as the gross value of cash provided and the gross fair value of securities provided to a counterparty for all transactions included within a qualifying master netting agreement; less the gross value of cash received and the gross fair value of securities received from the counterparty for those transactions (see the definition of 'qualifying master netting agreement' in 12 CFR 225; Appendix F; section 2). The net value

item_name: PREFERRED SHARES AND OTHER FORMS OF SUBORDINATED FUNDING NOT CAPTURED IN ITEM 15
description: Report the value of outstanding preferred shares and other forms of subordinated funding not captured in item 13 (e.g.; savings shares and silent partnerships). For publicly traded shares; report the closing share price multiplied by the number of shares outstanding on that day. Do not report non- publicly traded shares.

item_name: TRADING AND AFS SECURITIES THAT MEET THE DEFINITION OF LEVEL 1 ASSETS
description: Report the fair value of all trading and AFS securities that qualify as Level 1 assets according to paragraphs 50(c); 50(d) and 50(e) of the Basel III liquidity coverage ratio (LCR) (see Basel III: The Liquidity Coverage Ratio and liquidity risk monitoring tools; available at www.bis.org/publ/bcbs238.pdf). Include qualifying securities even if they do not fulfill the LCR operational requirements outlined in paragraphs 31-40.

item_name: TRADING AND AFS SECURITIES THAT MEET THE DEFINITION OF LEVEL 2 ASSETS; WITH HAIRCUTS
description: Report the fair value; after applying haircuts; of all trading and AFS securities that qualify as Level 2 assets according to paragraphs 52 and 54 of the Basel III LCR (see Basel III: The Liquidity Coverage Ratio and liquidity risk monitoring tools; available at www.bis.org/publ/bcbs238.pdf). Include qualifying securities even if they do not fulfill the LCR operational requirements outlined in paragraphs 31- 40. Level 2A; Level 2B RMBS; and Level 2B non-RMBS assets should be reported with haircu

item_name: ON-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTIONS: SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTIONS; GROSS
description: Report the value of all securities financing transactions included in item 1(a) without GAAP netting.

item_name: ON-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTIONS: SECURITIES RECEIVED AS COLLATERAL IN SECURITIES LENDING
description: Report the amount of securities received as collateral in principal securities lending transactions.

item_name: ON-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTIONS: CASH COLLATERAL RECEIVED IN CONDUIT SECURITIES LENDING TRANSACTIONS
description: Report the cash collateral received in conduit securities lending transactions.

item_name: ON-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: DERIVATIVES: DERIVATIVE EXPOSURES WITH A NET POSITIVE FAIR VALUE
description: Report the sum of net positive fair value derivative exposures netted in accordance with GAAP netting rules (i.e.; designated; legally enforceable; netting sets or groups). Include collateral held only if it is within the master netting agreement.

item_name: ON-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: DERIVATIVES: CASH COLLATERAL NETTED AGAINST THE DERIVATIVE EXPOSURES IN ITEM 1.C.(1)
description: Report the amount of cash collateral that was netted against derivative exposures in item 1(c)(1).

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: POTENTIAL FUTURE EXPOSURE OF DERIVATIVE CONTRACTS
description: Report the potential future exposure amount for each derivative contract to which the banking organization is a counterparty (or each single-product netting set of such transactions). This would be calculated in accordance with section 32(c)(5)(ii) and (c)(6) as applicable.

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: CREDIT DERIVATIVES: NOTIONAL AMOUNT OF CREDIT DERIVATIVES SOLD
description: Provide the total notional amount of credit derivatives sold.

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: CREDIT DERIVATIVES: CREDIT DERIVATIVES SOLD NET OF RELATED CREDIT PROTECTION BOUGHT
description: Credit derivatives sold net of related credit protection bought. Only net out the protection bought if it is for the same reference entity. If the protection bought is larger than the amount sold; only deduct the amount sold.

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: NOTIONAL AMOUNT OF OFF-BALANCE-SHEET ITEMS WITH A 0% CREDIT CONVERSION FACTOR (CCF)
description: Report off-balance sheet items that would be assigned a 0% credit conversion factor as defined in the standardized approach to credit risk in the Basel II framework. That is; commitments that are unconditionally cancellable at any time by the bank without prior notice (UCC); or that effectively provide for automatic cancellation due to deterioration in a borrower's creditworthiness (see paragraph 83 and footnote 33 of the Basel II framework; www.bis.org/publ/bcbs128.pdf). Note that items 2(c)(1)

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: NOTIONAL AMOUNT OF OFF-BALANCE-SHEET ITEMS WITH A 0% CREDIT CONVERSION FACTOR (CCF): UNCONDITIONALLY CANCELLABLE CREDIT CARD COMMITMENTS
description: Report credit card commitments that are unconditionally cancellable at any time by the bank without prior notice (UCC) that would receive a 0% CCF under the standardized approach to credit risk. Credit card commitments that effectively provide for automatic cancellation due to deterioration in a borrower's creditworthiness but that are not UCC should not be included in this item.

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: NOTIONAL AMOUNT OF OFF-BALANCE-SHEET ITEMS WITH A 0% CREDIT CONVERSION FACTOR (CCF): OTHER UNCONDITIONALLY CANCELLABLE COMMITMENTS
description: Report other commitments that are unconditionally cancellable at any time by the bank without prior notice that would receive a 0% CCF under the standardized approach to credit risk. Commitments that effectively provide for automatic cancellation due to deterioration in a borrower's creditworthiness but that are not UCC should not be included in this item.

item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: COMMERCIAL PAPER
description: Report the total holdings of commercial paper of unaffiliated financial institutions.

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: NOTIONAL AMOUNT OF OFF-BALANCE-SHEET ITEMS WITH A 50% CCF
description: Report off-balance sheet items that would be assigned a 50% credit conversion factor as defined in the standardized approach to credit risk (see paragraphs 83; 84(ii) and 84(iii) of the Basel II framework). This includes liquidity facilities and other commitments to securitizations incorporating the changes according to the Enhancements. That is; the CCF for all eligible liquidity facilities in the securitization framework is 50% regardless of the maturity. Off-balance sheet (OBS) exposures to o

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: NOTIONAL AMOUNT OF OFF-BALANCE-SHEET ITEMS WITH A 100% CCF
description: Report off-balance sheet items that would be assigned a 100% credit conversion factor as defined in the standardized approach to credit risk (see paragraphs 83(i); 83 (ii); 84 and 84(i) of the Basel II framework). This includes liquidity facilities and other commitments to securitizations incorporating the changes according to the Enhancements. OBS exposures to originated securitizations should be included only if the securitizations have met the accounting criteria for derecognition (to avoid d

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE-SHEET ITEMS: TOTAL OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS (SUM OF ITEMS 2.A; 2.C; AND 2.D THROUGH 2.F; MINUS 0.9 TIMES THE SUM OF ITEMS 2.C.(1) AND 2.C.(2))
description: Report the sum of items 2(a); 2(b); 2(c); 2(d); 2(e); and 2(f); minus 0.9 times the sum of items 2(c)(1) and 2(c)(2).

item_name: REGULATORY ADJUSTMENTS
description: Report the amount of regulatory adjustments from Tier 1 as reported in the Basel III NPR. These are the adjustments to Tier 1 capital (which include deductions made to common equity tier 1 capital) under the fully phased-in Basel III framework.

item_name: TOTAL EXPOSURES (SUM OF ITEMS 1.A AND 2.G; MINUS ITEM 3)
description: Report the sum of items 1(a) and 2(g); minus item 3.

item_name: FUNDS DEPOSITED WITH OR LENT TO UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
description: Report all funds deposited with or lent to other financial institutions (i.e. financial institutions other than the reporting group). Lending should include all forms of term/revolving lending to financial institutions

item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: SECURED DEBT SECURITIES
description: Report the total holdings of secured debt securities (e.g. covered bonds).

item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: SENIOR UNSECURED DEBT SECURITIES
description: Report the total holdings of senior unsecured debt securities.

item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: SUBORDINATED DEBT SECURITIES
description: Report the total holdings of subordinated debt securities

item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: CERTIFICATES OF DEPOSIT
description: Report the total holdings of Certificates of deposit

item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: STOCK (INCLUDING PAR AND SURPLUS OF COMMON AND PREFERRED SHARES)
description: Report total equity holdings including common and preferred shares.

item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: OFFSETTING SHORT POSITIONS IN RELATION TO THE SPECIFIC STOCK HOLDINGS INCLUDED IN ITEM 3.F
description: Report the total offsetting short positions held against the stock holdings included in item 3(f).

item_name: NET POSITIVE CURRENT EXPOSURE OF SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTIONS WITH UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
description: This item should include the following: (a) Net positive reverse repo exposure; where the value of the cash provided exceeds the fair value of the repoed securities held. (b) Net positive repo exposure; where the fair value of the repoed securities provided exceeds the value of the cash held. (c) Net positive securities lending exposure; where the fair value of securities lent exceeds the value of cash collateral taken (or the fair value of non-cash collateral taken). (d) Net positive securities

item_name: OVER-THE-COUNTER (OTC) DERIVATIVES WITH UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS THAT HAVE A NET POSITIVE FAIR VALUE: NET POSITIVE FAIR VALUE (INCLUDE COLLATERAL HELD IF IT IS WITHIN THE MASTER NETTING AGREEMENT)
description: Report the sum of net positive fair value OTC derivative exposures netted in accordance with GAAP netting rules (i.e. designated; legally enforceable; netting sets or groups). All netting sets with a positive value should be included here. Netting sets where the net result is negative should be captured in item 9(a). Include collateral held only if it is within the master netting agreement. For more information on netting; refer to ASC Subtopic 210-20; Balance Sheet - Offsetting; and the FR Y-9C

item_name: OVER-THE-COUNTER (OTC) DERIVATIVES WITH UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS THAT HAVE A NET POSITIVE FAIR VALUE: POTENTIAL FUTURE EXPOSURE
description: Report the amount of the potential future exposure; calculated using the current exposure method; for the derivatives included in item 5(a). Include the PFE for any netting sets with a fair value of zero.

item_name: OVER-THE-COUNTER (OTC) DERIVATIVES WITH UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS THAT HAVE A NET POSITIVE FAIR VALUE: FAIR VALUE OF COLLATERAL THAT IS HELD OUTSIDE OF THE MASTER NETTING AGREEMENTS
description: Report the fair value of collateral held in relation to the positive OTC contracts reported in item 5(a) that is not under a legally enforceable Credit Support Annex (CSA). Do not net against collateral provided; unless it is legally nettable.

item_name: TOTAL INTRA-FINANCIAL SYSTEM ASSETS (SUM OF ITEMS 1 THROUGH 3.F; 4; 5.A AND 5.B MINUS ITEM 3.G)
description: Report the sum of items 1 through 3(f); 4; 5(a) and 5(b) minus item 3(g).

item_name: DEPOSITS DUE TO UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS (INCLUDING UNDRAWN COMMITTED LINES): DEPOSITS DUE TO DEPOSITORY INSTITUTIONS
description: Report the total of all funds deposited by banks

item_name: DEPOSITS DUE TO UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS (INCLUDING UNDRAWN COMMITTED LINES): DEPOSITS DUE TO NON-DEPOSITORY FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
description: Report the total of all funds deposited by non-bank financial institutions.

item_name: DEPOSITS DUE TO UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS (INCLUDING UNDRAWN COMMITTED LINES): UNDRAWN COMMITTED LINES OBTAINED FROM UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
description: Report the nominal value of all undrawn committed lines obtained from other financial institutions

item_name: NET NEGATIVE CURRENT EXPOSURE OF SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTIONS WITH UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
description: This item should include the following: (a) Net negative repo exposure; where the value of the cash taken exceeds the fair value of the repoed securities provided. (b) Net negative reverse repo exposure; where the fair value of repoed securities held exceeds the cash provided. (c) Net negative securities lending exposure; where the value of cash collateral taken (or the fair value of non-cash collateral taken) exceeds the fair value of securities lent. (d) Net negative securities borrowing expos

item_name: OTC DERIVATIVES WITH UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS THAT HAVE A NET NEGATIVE FAIR VALUE: NET NEGATIVE FAIR VALUE (INCLUDE COLLATERAL PROVIDED IF IT IS WITHIN THE MASTER NETTING AGREEMENT)
description: Report the sum of net fair value OTC derivative liabilities netted in accordance with GAAP netting rules (i.e. designated; legally enforceable; netting sets or groups). All netting sets with a negative value should be included here. Netting sets where the net result is positive should be captured in item 5(a). Include collateral provided only if it is within the master netting agreement. For more information on netting; refer to ASC Subtopic 210-20; Balance Sheet - Offsetting; and the FR Y-9C Gl

item_name: OTC DERIVATIVES WITH UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS THAT HAVE A NET NEGATIVE FAIR VALUE: POTENTIAL FUTURE EXPOSURE
description: Report the amount of the potential future exposure; calculated using the current exposure method; for the derivatives included in item 9(a).

item_name: OTC DERIVATIVES WITH UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS THAT HAVE A NET NEGATIVE FAIR VALUE: FAIR VALUE OF COLLATERAL THAT IS PROVIDED OUTSIDE OF THE MASTER NETTING AGREEMENTS
description: Report the fair value of collateral posted in relation to the negative OTC contracts reported in item 9(a) that is not under a legally enforceable Credit Support Annex (CSA). Do not net against collateral taken; unless it is legally nettable.

item_name: TOTAL INTRA-FINANCIAL SYSTEM LIABILITIES
description: the sum of items 7.a; 7.b; 8; 9; 10; 11.a; and 11.b

item_name: SECURED DEBT SECURITIES
description: Report the value of all secured debt securities issued (e.g.; covered bonds).

item_name: SENIOR UNSECURED DEBT SECURITIES
description: Report the value of all senior unsecured debt securities issued as defined in FR Y-9C Schedule HC.

item_name: SUBORDINATED DEBT SECURITIES
description: Report the value of all subordinated debt securities issued.

item_name: CERTIFICATES OF DEPOSIT

item_name: TOTAL PAYMENTS ACTIVITY (SUM OF ITEMS 1.A THROUGH 1.M)
description: FR Y-15: Report the sum of items 1(a) through 1(m). 2012-12-31 value includes the 'All currencies not listed above'. Starting with the 2013-12-31 report; 'All currencies not listed above' is excluded from the sum of Total Payment Activity.

item_name: VALUE OF ASSETS HELD AS A CUSTODIAN ON BEHALF OF CUSTOMERS
description: Report the value of all assets that the banking organization holds as a custodian on behalf of customers; including other financial firms (i.e. financial institutions other than the reporting group). Do not include any assets under management or assets under administration which are not also classified as assets under custody. For the purposes of this report; a custodian is defined as a bank or other organization that manages or administers the custody or safekeeping of stock certificates; debt

item_name: EQUITY UNDERWRITING ACTIVITY
description: Report the total value of all types of underwritten equity instruments; excluding transactions with subsidiaries and/or affiliates and self-led transactions. This includes all types of equity market transactions such as initial public offerings; additional offerings of common stocks; units; depositary receipts (e.g.; American depository receipts (ADRs) and Global depository receipts (GDRs)); and rights offerings. Also include equity-linked transactions such as convertible bonds; convertible pref

item_name: DEBT UNDERWRITING ACTIVITY
description: Report the total value of all types of underwritten debt instruments underwritten; excluding intra-group or self-led transactions. This includes all types of underwriting transactions relating to debt securities. The value should include both secured debt instruments (e.g.; covered bonds; asset-backed security (ABS) transactions; etc.) and unsecured debt instruments. Include all types of transactions at all maturities. Do not differentiate transactions between front-end; back-end; and best-effor

item_name: TOTAL UNDERWRITING ACTIVITY
description: Report the sum of items 4 and 5.

item_name: OTC DERIVATIVES CLEARED THROUGH A CENTRAL COUNTERPARTY
description: Report the notional amount outstanding of OTC derivative positions which were cleared through a central counterparty. Include all types of risk categories and instruments (e.g.; foreign exchange; interest rate; equity; commodities; CDS and unallocated). For more information on derivatives; refer to ASC Topic 815; Derivatives; and the FR Y-9C Glossary entry for 'derivative contracts.'

item_name: OTC DERIVATIVES SETTLED BILATERALLY
description: Report the notional amount outstanding of OTC derivative positions which were settled bilaterally (i.e.; without the use of a central counterparty). Include all types of risk categories and instruments (e.g.; foreign exchange; interest rate; equity; commodities; CDS and unallocated). For more information on derivatives; refer to ASC Topic 815; Derivatives; and the FR Y-9C Glossary entry for 'derivative contracts.'

item_name: TOTAL NOTIONAL AMOUNT OF DERIVATIVE CONTRACTS
description: the sum of items 1 and 2

item_name: TRADING SECURITIES
description: Report the value of all securities classified as held for trading. Securities that are intended to be held principally for the purpose of selling them in the near term should be classified as trading assets. Trading activity includes active and frequent buying and selling of securities for the purpose of generating profits on short-term fluctuations in price. All values reported should be at the reporting date and provided on a gross long basis (i.e.; short positions should not be netted against

item_name: TRADING SECURITIES: SECURITIES IN ITEM 4 FOR WHICH THE FAIR VALUE OPTION IS ELECTED
description: Report the value of all securities for which the fair value option is elected. Institutions may elect to report securities at fair value in accordance with FASB ASC Subtopic 825-10; Financial Instruments - Overall (formerly FASB Statement No. 159; The Fair Value Option for Financial Assets and Financial Liabilities). item_name: VALUE OF TRADING AND AFS SECURITIES (SUM OF ITEMS 4 AND 5)
description: Report the sum of items 4 through 6.

item_name: TOTAL STOCK OF LEVEL 1 ASSETS
description: Report the total stock of Level 1 assets as provided in the 'LCR' worksheet of the Basel III implementation monitoring reporting template. For more information on Level 1 assets; refer to Instructions for Basel III implementation monitoring; http://www.bis.org/bcbs/qis/biiiimplmoninstr.pdf.

item_name: TOTAL STOCK OF LEVEL 1 ASSETS: SECURITIES IN ITEM 7 THAT ARE TRADING OR AFS SECURITIES
description: Report the amount of Level 1 assets that are designated as held for trading; available for sale; or FVO. This value should be a subset of item 8.

item_name: TOTAL STOCK OF LEVEL 2 ASSETS
description: Report the total stock of Level 2 assets as provided in the 'LCR' worksheet of the Basel III implementation monitoring reporting template. For more information on Level 2 assets; refer to Instructions for Basel III implementation monitoring; http://www.bis.org/bcbs/qis/biiiimplmoninstr.pdf.

item_name: TOTAL STOCK OF LEVEL 2 ASSETS: SECURITIES IN ITEM 8 THAT ARE TRADING OR AFS SECURITIES
description: Report the amount of Level 2 assets that are designated as held for trading; available for sale; or FVO. This value should be a subset of item 10.

item_name: ADJUSTMENT TO STOCK OF HIGH QUALITY LIQUID ASSETS (HQLA) DUE TO CAP ON LEVEL 2 ASSETS
description: Report the adjustment to the stock of high quality liquid assets due to the cap on Level 2 assets as provided in the 'LCR' worksheet of the Basel III implementation monitoring reporting template. For more information on the adjustment to stock of HQLA due to the cap on Level 2 assets; refer to Instructions for Basel III implementation monitoring; http://www.bis.org/bcbs/qis/biiiimplmoninstr.pdf.

item_name: ADJUSTMENT TO STOCK OF HIGH QUALITY LIQUID ASSETS (HQLA) DUE TO CAP ON LEVEL 2 ASSETS: AMOUNT OF ITEM 9 ATTRIBUTABLE TO TRADING AND AFS SECURITIES
description: This item is calculated by first taking item 12 and dividing it by the sum of items 8 and 10. This value should then be multiplied by the sum of items 9 and 11.

item_name: TOTAL VALUE OF TRADING AND AFS SECURITIES LESS HQLA (ITEM 6 MINUS ITEM 9.A)
description: Report the value of item 7 minus item 13.

item_name: TOTAL FOREIGN CLAIMS ON AN ULTIMATE RISK BASIS
description: Report the value of all claims over all sectors that; on an ultimate-risk basis; are cross-border claims or foreign-office claims on local residents. (See FFIEC 009; Schedule 1; Columns 15 through 20; and FFIEC 019 Column 6). For definitions; refer to the instructions for preparation of the FFIEC 009.

item_name: FOREIGN LIABILITIES (EXCLUDING LOCAL LIABILITIES IN LOCAL CURRENCY)
description: Report the sum of all foreign-office liabilities in non-local currency; all U.S. dollar liabilities to foreign-residents; and all foreign currency liabilities to foreigners. (See FFIEC 009; Schedule 1a; Column 1; TIC BL-1; Column 7; and; TIC BQ-2; Columns 1 and 2.) For definitions; refer to the instructions for preparation of the FFIEC 009 and the Treasury International Capital (TIC) B Reports.

item_name: FOREIGN LIABILITIES (EXCLUDING LOCAL LIABILITIES IN LOCAL CURRENCY): ANY FOREIGN LIABILITIES TO RELATED OFFICES INCLUDED IN ITEM 2
description: Report the value of any liabilities included in item 2 that are to the banking organization's own foreign offices. (See TIC BL-1; Column 8; and the values reported in TIC B-2; Columns 1 and 2.)

item_name: LOCAL LIABILITIES IN LOCAL CURRENCY
description: Report the value of all foreign-office liabilities in local currency. (See FFIEC 009; Schedule 1a; Column 2.) For definitions; refer to the instructions for the preparation of the FFIEC 009.

item_name: TOTAL CROSS-JURISDICTIONAL LIABILITIES (SUM OF ITEMS 2 AND 3; MINUS ITEM 2.A)
description: Report the sum of items 2 and 4 minus item 3.

item_name: RETAIL FUNDING
description: Report total deposits less the sum of (i) deposits from banks; (ii) deposits from central banks; and (iii) certificates of deposit not held by retail customers or small businesses.

item_name: TOTAL NET REVENUE
description: Report total net revenue; which is defined as gross revenue minus the interest expense.

item_name: FOREIGN NET REVENUE
description: Report the net revenue from all non-domestic branches and subsidiaries. Net revenue is defined as the sum of interest income; trading gains (loss); investment income (loss); commission and fees; and other operating income (loss); minus the interest expense. Domestic is defined as the country where the group is headquartered.

item_name: TOTAL GROSS REVENUE
description: Report the total gross revenue; which is defined as the sum of interest income; trading gains (loss); investment income (loss); commission and fees; and other operating income (loss).

item_name: PEAK EQUITY MARKET CAPITALIZATION
description: Report the peak market capitalization over the reporting period. The market capitalization for a given day is defined as the closing share price multiplied by the number of shares outstanding on that day.

item_name: GROSS VALUE OF CASH LENT AND GROSS FAIR VALUE OF SECURITIES LENT IN SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTIONS
description: Report the gross value of all cash lent and the gross fair value of all securities lent in securities financing transactions. The reported value should not include any counterparty netting and should only represent transactions completed by the firm on its own behalf (i.e.; transactions where the firm acted as principal).

item_name: GROSS VALUE OF CASH BORROWED AND GROSS FAIR VALUE OF SECURITIES BORROWED IN SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTIONS
description: Report the gross value of all cash borrowed and the gross fair value of all securities borrowed in securities financing transactions. The reported value should not include any counterparty netting and should only represent transactions completed by the firm on its own behalf (i.e.; transactions where the firm acted as principal).

item_name: GROSS POSITIVE FAIR VALUE OF OVER-THE-COUNTER (OTC) DERIVATIVES TRANSACTIONS
description: Report the gross positive fair value of OTC derivative transactions. The reported value should not include any counterparty netting and should only represent transactions completed by the firm on its own behalf (i.e.; transactions where the firm acted as principal).

item_name: GROSS NEGATIVE FAIR VALUE OF OTC DERIVATIVES TRANSACTIONS
description: Report the gross negative fair value of OTC derivative transactions. The reported value should not include any counterparty netting and should only represent transactions completed by the firm on its own behalf (i.e.; transactions where the firm acted as principal).

item_name: UNSECURED SETTLEMENT/CLEARING LINES PROVIDED
description: Report the total amount of unsecured intraday credit lines extended to the banking organization's customers. This should include lines extended for cash overdrafts; securities clearing; and transaction lines (e.g.; FX settlement limits).

item_name: NUMBER OF JURISDICTIONS
description: Report the number of countries where the banking organization has either a branch or a subsidiary.

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: NOTIONAL AMOUNT OF OFF-BALANCE-SHEET ITEMS WITH A 20% CCF
description: Report off-balance-sheet items that would be assigned a 20% credit conversion factor as defined in the standardized approach to credit risk (see paragraphs 83; 85; and footnote 32 of the Basel II framework). This would include commitments with an original maturity up to one year and short-term self-liquidating trade letters of credit arising from the movement of goods (e.g.; documentary credits collateralized by the underlying shipment) of both issuing and confirming banking organizations.

item_name: LINE ITEM LEVEL DATA CONFIDENTIALITY INDICATOR
description: A one-digit code indicating individual line items may have a confidential status. Code: This value may not be null for all series. 1 = Public - by virtue of no request for confidentiality 2 = Confidential - by virtue of a pending request for confidentiality 3 = Public - by virtue of a Federal Reserve System denied request for confidentiality 4 = Confidential - by virtue of a Federal Reserve System granted request for confidentiality ****** ******* ****** RCONM962 (FFIEC 031/041) A one-digit code

item_name: Trading volume - fixed income
description: RISO: The sum of items M5(a) through M5(b). RISI: The sum of items M5(a) through M5(b). RISK: The sum of items M5(a) through M5(b).

item_name: Trading volume - equities and other securities
description: RISO: The sum of items M5(c) and M5(d). RISI: The sum of items M5(c) and M5(d). RISK: The sum of items M5(c) and M5(d).

item_name: TOTAL ADJUSTED TRADING AND AFS SECURITIES
description: Total adjusted trading and AFS securities equals the sum of trading and AFS securities that meet the definition of Level 1 assets and trading and AFS securities that meet the definition of Level 2 assets with haircuts.

item_name: ON-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: TOTAL ON-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS
description: Report the sum of items 1.a; 1.b.(2) and 1.c.(2) minus the sum of items 1.b.(1) and 1.b.(3)).

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE-SHEET ITEMS: COUNTERPARTY RISK EXPOSURES: COUNTERPARTY EXPOSURE OF SFTS
description: Report the counterparty exposure of SFTs. Counterparty exposure is determined as the gross value of cash provided and the gross fair value of securities provided to a counterparty for all transactions included within a qualifying master netting agreement; less the gross value of cash received and the gross fair value of securities received from the counterparty for those transactions (see the definition of 'qualifying master netting agreement' in 12 CFR 225; Appendix F; section 2). The net value

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: CREDIT DERIVATIVES: CREDIT DERIVATIVES SOLD NET OF RELATED CREDIT PROTECTION BOUGHT; ADJUSTED FOR MATURITY
description: Report credit derivatives sold net of related credit protection bought. Only net out the protection bought if it is for the same reference entity and the maturity of the protection bought is greater than or equal to the maturity of the credit protection sold. If the protection bought for a reference entity exceeds the amount sold; report a zero for that particular reference entity.

item_name: PREFERRED SHARES AND OTHER FORMS OF SUBORDINATED FUNDING NOT CAPTURED IN ITEM 15
description: Report the value of outstanding preferred shares and other forms of subordinated funding not captured in item 13 (e.g.; savings shares and silent partnerships). For publicly traded shares; report the closing share price multiplied by the number of shares outstanding on that day. Do not report non- publicly traded shares.

item_name: TRADING AND AFS SECURITIES THAT MEET THE DEFINITION OF LEVEL 1 ASSETS
description: Report the fair value of all trading and AFS securities that qualify as Level 1 assets according to paragraphs 50(c); 50(d) and 50(e) of the Basel III liquidity coverage ratio (LCR) (see Basel III: The Liquidity Coverage Ratio and liquidity risk monitoring tools; available at www.bis.org/publ/bcbs238.pdf). Include qualifying securities even if they do not fulfill the LCR operational requirements outlined in paragraphs 31-40.

item_name: TRADING AND AFS SECURITIES THAT MEET THE DEFINITION OF LEVEL 2 ASSETS; WITH HAIRCUTS
description: Report the fair value; after applying haircuts; of all trading and AFS securities that qualify as Level 2 assets according to paragraphs 52 and 54 of the Basel III LCR (see Basel III: The Liquidity Coverage Ratio and liquidity risk monitoring tools; available at www.bis.org/publ/bcbs238.pdf). Include qualifying securities even if they do not fulfill the LCR operational requirements outlined in paragraphs 31- 40. Level 2A; Level 2B RMBS; and Level 2B non-RMBS assets should be reported with haircu

SVGL - For each Level (1; 2; or 3) and for the total before netting; the EFS software will compute this line as the sum of the corresponding amounts reported or computed for each asset category; as follows: FV43 = FV113 + FV133 + FV153 + FV213 + FV243 + FV263 + FV313 Beginning 20110331 Reported on Schedule Q for the FFIEC 002 report

item_name: OTHER UNUSED COMMITMENTS: LOANS TO FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
description: Report the unused portions of commitments to extend credit to financial institutions; i.e.; commitments that; when funded; would be reportable either as loans to depository institutions in Schedule RC-C; part I; item 2; 'Loans to depository institutions and acceptances of other banks;' or as loans to nondepository financial institutions in Schedule RC-C; part I; item 9.a; 'Loans to nondepository financial institutions.' Securities traded in the last four quarters: Securities issued by public sector entities
Securities traded in the last four quarters: Other fixed income securities
Securities traded in the last four quarters: Listed equities
Securities traded in the last four quarters: Other securities
Foreign derivative claims on an ultimate-risk basis

description: RISO: The sum of items M5(a) through M5(d). RISI: The sum of items M5(a) through M5(d). RISK: The sum of items M5(a) through M5(d).

item_name: Adjusted foreign claims on an ultimate-risk basis
ON-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTIONS: SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTIONS; GROSS
description: Report the value of all securities financing transactions included in item 1(a) without GAAP netting.

item_name: ON-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTIONS: SECURITIES RECEIVED AS COLLATERAL IN SECURITIES LENDING
description: Report the amount of securities received as collateral in principal securities lending transactions.

item_name: ON-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTIONS: CASH COLLATERAL RECEIVED IN CONDUIT SECURITIES LENDING TRANSACTIONS
description: Report the cash collateral received in conduit securities lending transactions.

item_name: ON-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: DERIVATIVES: DERIVATIVE EXPOSURES WITH A NET POSITIVE FAIR VALUE
description: Report the sum of net positive fair value derivative exposures netted in accordance with GAAP netting rules (i.e.; designated; legally enforceable; netting sets or groups). Include collateral held only if it is within the master netting agreement.

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: POTENTIAL FUTURE EXPOSURE OF DERIVATIVE CONTRACTS
description: Report the potential future exposure amount for each derivative contract to which the banking organization is a counterparty (or each single-product netting set of such transactions). This would be calculated in accordance with section 32(c)(5)(ii) and (c)(6) as applicable.

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: CREDIT DERIVATIVES: NOTIONAL AMOUNT OF CREDIT DERIVATIVES SOLD
description: Provide the total notional amount of credit derivatives sold.

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: CREDIT DERIVATIVES: CREDIT DERIVATIVES SOLD NET OF RELATED CREDIT PROTECTION BOUGHT
description: Credit derivatives sold net of related credit protection bought. Only net out the protection bought if it is for the same reference entity. If the protection bought is larger than the amount sold; only deduct the amount sold.

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: NOTIONAL AMOUNT OF OFF-BALANCE-SHEET ITEMS WITH A 0% CREDIT CONVERSION FACTOR (CCF)
description: Report off-balance sheet items that would be assigned a 0% credit conversion factor as defined in the standardized approach to credit risk in the Basel II framework. That is; commitments that are unconditionally cancellable at any time by the bank without prior notice (UCC); or that effectively provide for automatic cancellation due to deterioration in a borrower's creditworthiness (see paragraph 83 and footnote 33 of the Basel II framework; www.bis.org/publ/bcbs128.pdf). Note that items 2(c)(1)

item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: COMMERCIAL PAPER
description: Report the total holdings of commercial paper of unaffiliated financial institutions.

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: NOTIONAL AMOUNT OF OFF-BALANCE-SHEET ITEMS WITH A 50% CCF
description: Report off-balance sheet items that would be assigned a 50% credit conversion factor as defined in the standardized approach to credit risk (see paragraphs 83; 84(ii) and 84(iii) of the Basel II framework). This includes liquidity facilities and other commitments to securitizations incorporating the changes according to the Enhancements. That is; the CCF for all eligible liquidity facilities in the securitization framework is 50% regardless of the maturity. Off-balance sheet (OBS) exposures to o

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: NOTIONAL AMOUNT OF OFF-BALANCE-SHEET ITEMS WITH A 100% CCF
description: Report off-balance sheet items that would be assigned a 100% credit conversion factor as defined in the standardized approach to credit risk (see paragraphs 83(i); 83 (ii); 84 and 84(i) of the Basel II framework). This includes liquidity facilities and other commitments to securitizations incorporating the changes according to the Enhancements. OBS exposures to originated securitizations should be included only if the securitizations have met the accounting criteria for derecognition (to avoid d

item_name: REGULATORY ADJUSTMENTS
description: Report the amount of regulatory adjustments from Tier 1 as reported in the Basel III NPR. These are the adjustments to Tier 1 capital (which include deductions made to common equity tier 1 capital) under the fully phased-in Basel III framework.

item_name: FUNDS DEPOSITED WITH OR LENT TO UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
description: Report all funds deposited with or lent to other financial institutions (i.e. financial institutions other than the reporting group). Lending should include all forms of term/revolving lending to financial institutions

item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: SECURED DEBT SECURITIES
description: Report the total holdings of secured debt securities (e.g. covered bonds).

item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: SENIOR UNSECURED DEBT SECURITIES
description: Report the total holdings of senior unsecured debt securities.

item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: SUBORDINATED DEBT SECURITIES
description: Report the total holdings of subordinated debt securities

item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: CERTIFICATES OF DEPOSIT
description: Report the total holdings of Certificates of deposit

item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: STOCK (INCLUDING PAR AND SURPLUS OF COMMON AND PREFERRED SHARES)
description: Report total equity holdings including common and preferred shares.

item_name: HOLDINGS OF SECURITIES ISSUED BY UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS: OFFSETTING SHORT POSITIONS IN RELATION TO THE SPECIFIC STOCK HOLDINGS INCLUDED IN ITEM 3.F
description: Report the total offsetting short positions held against the stock holdings included in item 3(f).

item_name: NET POSITIVE CURRENT EXPOSURE OF SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTIONS WITH UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
description: This item should include the following: (a) Net positive reverse repo exposure; where the value of the cash provided exceeds the fair value of the repoed securities held. (b) Net positive repo exposure; where the fair value of the repoed securities provided exceeds the value of the cash held. (c) Net positive securities lending exposure; where the fair value of securities lent exceeds the value of cash collateral taken (or the fair value of non-cash collateral taken). (d) Net positive securities

item_name: OVER-THE-COUNTER (OTC) DERIVATIVES WITH UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS THAT HAVE A NET POSITIVE FAIR VALUE: NET POSITIVE FAIR VALUE (INCLUDE COLLATERAL HELD IF IT IS WITHIN THE MASTER NETTING AGREEMENT)
description: Report the sum of net positive fair value OTC derivative exposures netted in accordance with GAAP netting rules (i.e. designated; legally enforceable; netting sets or groups). All netting sets with a positive value should be included here. Netting sets where the net result is negative should be captured in item 9(a). Include collateral held only if it is within the master netting agreement. For more information on netting; refer to ASC Subtopic 210-20; Balance Sheet - Offsetting; and the FR Y-9C

item_name: OVER-THE-COUNTER (OTC) DERIVATIVES WITH UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS THAT HAVE A NET POSITIVE FAIR VALUE: POTENTIAL FUTURE EXPOSURE
description: Report the amount of the potential future exposure; calculated using the current exposure method; for the derivatives included in item 5(a). Include the PFE for any netting sets with a fair value of zero.

item_name: TOTAL INTRA-FINANCIAL SYSTEM ASSETS (SUM OF ITEMS 1 THROUGH 3.F; 4; 5.A AND 5.B MINUS ITEM 3.G)
description: Report the sum of items 1 through 3(f); 4; 5(a) and 5(b) minus item 3(g).

item_name: DEPOSITS DUE TO UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS (INCLUDING UNDRAWN COMMITTED LINES): DEPOSITS DUE TO DEPOSITORY INSTITUTIONS
description: Report the total of all funds deposited by banks

item_name: DEPOSITS DUE TO UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS (INCLUDING UNDRAWN COMMITTED LINES): DEPOSITS DUE TO NON-DEPOSITORY FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
description: Report the total of all funds deposited by non-bank financial institutions.

item_name: DEPOSITS DUE TO UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS (INCLUDING UNDRAWN COMMITTED LINES): UNDRAWN COMMITTED LINES OBTAINED FROM UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
description: Report the nominal value of all undrawn committed lines obtained from other financial institutions

item_name: NET NEGATIVE CURRENT EXPOSURE OF SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTIONS WITH UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
description: This item should include the following: (a) Net negative repo exposure; where the value of the cash taken exceeds the fair value of the repoed securities provided. (b) Net negative reverse repo exposure; where the fair value of repoed securities held exceeds the cash provided. (c) Net negative securities lending exposure; where the value of cash collateral taken (or the fair value of non-cash collateral taken) exceeds the fair value of securities lent. (d) Net negative securities borrowing expos

item_name: OTC DERIVATIVES WITH UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS THAT HAVE A NET NEGATIVE FAIR VALUE: NET NEGATIVE FAIR VALUE (INCLUDE COLLATERAL PROVIDED IF IT IS WITHIN THE MASTER NETTING AGREEMENT)
description: Report the sum of net fair value OTC derivative liabilities netted in accordance with GAAP netting rules (i.e. designated; legally enforceable; netting sets or groups). All netting sets with a negative value should be included here. Netting sets where the net result is positive should be captured in item 5(a). Include collateral provided only if it is within the master netting agreement. For more information on netting; refer to ASC Subtopic 210-20; Balance Sheet - Offsetting; and the FR Y-9C Gl

item_name: OTC DERIVATIVES WITH UNAFFILIATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS THAT HAVE A NET NEGATIVE FAIR VALUE: POTENTIAL FUTURE EXPOSURE
description: Report the amount of the potential future exposure; calculated using the current exposure method; for the derivatives included in item 9(a).

item_name: TOTAL INTRA-FINANCIAL SYSTEM LIABILITIES
description: the sum of items 7.a; 7.b; 8; 9; 10; 11.a; and 11.b

item_name: SECURED DEBT SECURITIES
description: Report the value of all secured debt securities issued (e.g.; covered bonds).

item_name: SENIOR UNSECURED DEBT SECURITIES
description: Report the value of all senior unsecured debt securities issued as defined in FR Y-9C Schedule HC.

item_name: SUBORDINATED DEBT SECURITIES
description: Report the value of all subordinated debt securities issued.

item_name: CERTIFICATES OF DEPOSIT
description: Report the value of all certificates of deposit issued.

item_name: EQUITY MARKET CAPITALIZATION
description: Report the value of all common and preferred stock (par value plus related surplus); and retained earnings.

item_name: TOTAL SECURITIES ISSUED
PAYMENTS MADE IN THE REPORTING YEAR: AUSTRALIAN DOLLARS (AUD)
description: Report the total value of all payments made in Australian dollars (AUD) over the reporting period.

item_name: PAYMENTS MADE IN THE REPORTING YEAR: BRAZILIAN REAL (BRL)
description: Report the total value of all payments made in Brazilian real (BRL) over the reporting period.

item_name: PAYMENTS MADE IN THE REPORTING YEAR: CANADIAN DOLLARS (CAD)
description: Report the total value of all payments made in Canadian dollars (CAD) over the reporting period.

item_name: PAYMENTS MADE IN THE REPORTING YEAR: SWISS FRANCS (CHF)
description: Report the total value of all payments made in Swiss francs (CHF) over the reporting period.

item_name: PAYMENTS MADE IN THE REPORTING YEAR: CHINESE YUAN (CNY)
description: Report the total value of all payments made in Chinese yuan (CNY) over the reporting period.

item_name: PAYMENTS MADE IN THE REPORTING YEAR: EUROS (EUR)
description: Report the total value of all payments made in euros (EUR) over the reporting period.

item_name: PAYMENTS MADE IN THE REPORTING YEAR: POUND STERLING (GBP)
description: Report the total value of all payments made in pound sterling (GBP) over the reporting period.

item_name: PAYMENTS MADE IN THE REPORTING YEAR: HONG KONG DOLLARS (HKD)
description: Report the total value of all payments made in Hong Kong dollars (HKD) over the reporting period.

item_name: PAYMENTS MADE IN THE REPORTING YEAR: INDIAN RUPEE (INR)
description: Report the total value of all payments made in Indian rupee (INR) over the reporting period.

item_name: PAYMENTS MADE IN THE REPORTING YEAR: JAPANESE YEN (JPY)
description: Report the total value of all payments made in Japanese yen (JPY) over the reporting period.

item_name: PAYMENTS MADE IN THE REPORTING YEAR: SWEDISH KRONA (SEK)
description: Report the total value of all payments made in Swedish krona (SEK) over the reporting period.

item_name: PAYMENTS MADE IN THE REPORTING YEAR: UNITED STATES DOLLARS (USD)
description: Report the total value of all payments made in United States dollars (USD) over the reporting period.

item_name: PAYMENTS MADE IN THE REPORTING YEAR: ALL CURRENCIES NOT LISTED ABOVE
description: Report the total value of all payments made all currencies not listed in items 1(a) through 1(l) over the reporting period. The yearly aggregates for each currency should be converted to U.S. dollars using yearly average exchange rates.

item_name: TOTAL PAYMENTS ACTIVITY (SUM OF ITEMS 1.A THROUGH 1.M)
description: FR Y-15: Report the sum of items 1(a) through 1(m). 2012-12-31 value includes the 'All currencies not listed above'. Starting with the 2013-12-31 report; 'All currencies not listed above' is excluded from the sum of Total Payment Activity.

item_name: VALUE OF ASSETS HELD AS A CUSTODIAN ON BEHALF OF CUSTOMERS
description: Report the value of all assets that the banking organization holds as a custodian on behalf of customers; including other financial firms (i.e. financial institutions other than the reporting group). Do not include any assets under management or assets under administration which are not also classified as assets under custody. For the purposes of this report; a custodian is defined as a bank or other organization that manages or administers the custody or safekeeping of stock certificates; debt

item_name: EQUITY UNDERWRITING ACTIVITY
description: Report the total value of all types of underwritten equity instruments; excluding transactions with subsidiaries and/or affiliates and self-led transactions. This includes all types of equity market transactions such as initial public offerings; additional offerings of common stocks; units; depositary receipts (e.g.; American depository receipts (ADRs) and Global depository receipts (GDRs)); and rights offerings. Also include equity-linked transactions such as convertible bonds; convertible pref

item_name: DEBT UNDERWRITING ACTIVITY
description: Report the total value of all types of underwritten debt instruments underwritten; excluding intra-group or self-led transactions. This includes all types of underwriting transactions relating to debt securities. The value should include both secured debt instruments (e.g.; covered bonds; asset-backed security (ABS) transactions; etc.) and unsecured debt instruments. Include all types of transactions at all maturities. Do not differentiate transactions between front-end; back-end; and best-effor

item_name: TOTAL UNDERWRITING ACTIVITY
description: Report the sum of items 4 and 5.

item_name: OTC DERIVATIVES CLEARED THROUGH A CENTRAL COUNTERPARTY
description: Report the notional amount outstanding of OTC derivative positions which were cleared through a central counterparty. Include all types of risk categories and instruments (e.g.; foreign exchange; interest rate; equity; commodities; CDS and unallocated). For more information on derivatives; refer to ASC Topic 815; Derivatives; and the FR Y-9C Glossary entry for 'derivative contracts.'

item_name: OTC DERIVATIVES SETTLED BILATERALLY
description: Report the notional amount outstanding of OTC derivative positions which were settled bilaterally (i.e.; without the use of a central counterparty). Include all types of risk categories and instruments (e.g.; foreign exchange; interest rate; equity; commodities; CDS and unallocated). For more information on derivatives; refer to ASC Topic 815; Derivatives; and the FR Y-9C Glossary entry for 'derivative contracts.'

item_name: TOTAL NOTIONAL AMOUNT OF DERIVATIVE CONTRACTS
description: the sum of items 1 and 2

item_name: TRADING SECURITIES
description: Report the value of all securities classified as held for trading. Securities that are intended to be held principally for the purpose of selling them in the near term should be classified as trading assets. Trading activity includes active and frequent buying and selling of securities for the purpose of generating profits on short-term fluctuations in price. All values reported should be at the reporting date and provided on a gross long basis (i.e.; short positions should not be netted against

item_name: VALUE OF TRADING AND AFS SECURITIES (SUM OF ITEMS 4 AND 5)
description: Report the sum of items 4 through 6.

item_name: TOTAL FOREIGN CLAIMS ON AN ULTIMATE RISK BASIS
description: Report the value of all claims over all sectors that; on an ultimate-risk basis; are cross-border claims or foreign-office claims on local residents. (See FFIEC 009; Schedule 1; Columns 15 through 20; and FFIEC 019 Column 6). For definitions; refer to the instructions for preparation of the FFIEC 009.

item_name: FOREIGN LIABILITIES (EXCLUDING LOCAL LIABILITIES IN LOCAL CURRENCY)
description: Report the sum of all foreign-office liabilities in non-local currency; all U.S. dollar liabilities to foreign-residents; and all foreign currency liabilities to foreigners. (See FFIEC 009; Schedule 1a; Column 1; TIC BL-1; Column 7; and; TIC BQ-2; Columns 1 and 2.) For definitions; refer to the instructions for preparation of the FFIEC 009 and the Treasury International Capital (TIC) B Reports.

item_name: FOREIGN LIABILITIES (EXCLUDING LOCAL LIABILITIES IN LOCAL CURRENCY): ANY FOREIGN LIABILITIES TO RELATED OFFICES INCLUDED IN ITEM 2
description: Report the value of any liabilities included in item 2 that are to the banking organization's own foreign offices. (See TIC BL-1; Column 8; and the values reported in TIC B-2; Columns 1 and 2.)

item_name: LOCAL LIABILITIES IN LOCAL CURRENCY
description: Report the value of all foreign-office liabilities in local currency. (See FFIEC 009; Schedule 1a; Column 2.) For definitions; refer to the instructions for the preparation of the FFIEC 009.

item_name: TOTAL CROSS-JURISDICTIONAL LIABILITIES (SUM OF ITEMS 2 AND 3; MINUS ITEM 2.A)
description: Report the sum of items 2 and 4 minus item 3.

item_name: RETAIL FUNDING
description: Report total deposits less the sum of (i) deposits from banks; (ii) deposits from central banks; and (iii) certificates of deposit not held by retail customers or small businesses.

item_name: TOTAL NET REVENUE
description: Report total net revenue; which is defined as gross revenue minus the interest expense.

item_name: FOREIGN NET REVENUE
description: Report the net revenue from all non-domestic branches and subsidiaries. Net revenue is defined as the sum of interest income; trading gains (loss); investment income (loss); commission and fees; and other operating income (loss); minus the interest expense. Domestic is defined as the country where the group is headquartered.

item_name: TOTAL GROSS REVENUE
description: Report the total gross revenue; which is defined as the sum of interest income; trading gains (loss); investment income (loss); commission and fees; and other operating income (loss).

item_name: GROSS VALUE OF CASH LENT AND GROSS FAIR VALUE OF SECURITIES LENT IN SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTIONS
description: Report the gross value of all cash lent and the gross fair value of all securities lent in securities financing transactions. The reported value should not include any counterparty netting and should only represent transactions completed by the firm on its own behalf (i.e.; transactions where the firm acted as principal).

item_name: GROSS VALUE OF CASH BORROWED AND GROSS FAIR VALUE OF SECURITIES BORROWED IN SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTIONS
description: Report the gross value of all cash borrowed and the gross fair value of all securities borrowed in securities financing transactions. The reported value should not include any counterparty netting and should only represent transactions completed by the firm on its own behalf (i.e.; transactions where the firm acted as principal).

item_name: GROSS POSITIVE FAIR VALUE OF OVER-THE-COUNTER (OTC) DERIVATIVES TRANSACTIONS
description: Report the gross positive fair value of OTC derivative transactions. The reported value should not include any counterparty netting and should only represent transactions completed by the firm on its own behalf (i.e.; transactions where the firm acted as principal).

item_name: GROSS NEGATIVE FAIR VALUE OF OTC DERIVATIVES TRANSACTIONS
description: Report the gross negative fair value of OTC derivative transactions. The reported value should not include any counterparty netting and should only represent transactions completed by the firm on its own behalf (i.e.; transactions where the firm acted as principal).

item_name: UNSECURED SETTLEMENT/CLEARING LINES PROVIDED
description: Report the total amount of unsecured intraday credit lines extended to the banking organization's customers. This should include lines extended for cash overdrafts; securities clearing; and transaction lines (e.g.; FX settlement limits).

item_name: NUMBER OF JURISDICTIONS
description: Report the number of countries where the banking organization has either a branch or a subsidiary.

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS: NOTIONAL AMOUNT OF OFF-BALANCE-SHEET ITEMS WITH A 20% CCF
description: Report off-balance-sheet items that would be assigned a 20% credit conversion factor as defined in the standardized approach to credit risk (see paragraphs 83; 85; and footnote 32 of the Basel II framework). This would include commitments with an original maturity up to one year and short-term self-liquidating trade letters of credit arising from the movement of goods (e.g.; documentary credits collateralized by the underlying shipment) of both issuing and confirming banking organizations.

item_name: Trading volume - fixed income
description: RISO: The sum of items M5(a) through M5(b). RISI: The sum of items M5(a) through M5(b). RISK: The sum of items M5(a) through M5(b).

item_name: Trading volume - equities and other securities
description: RISO: The sum of items M5(c) and M5(d). RISI: The sum of items M5(c) and M5(d). RISK: The sum of items M5(c) and M5(d).

item_name: TOTAL ADJUSTED TRADING AND AFS SECURITIES
description: Total adjusted trading and AFS securities equals the sum of trading and AFS securities that meet the definition of Level 1 assets and trading and AFS securities that meet the definition of Level 2 assets with haircuts.

item_name: DERIVATIVES AND OFF-BALANCE-SHEET ITEMS: COUNTERPARTY RISK EXPOSURES: COUNTERPARTY EXPOSURE OF SFTS
description: Report the counterparty exposure of SFTs. Counterparty exposure is determined as the gross value of cash provided and the gross fair value of securities provided to a counterparty for all transactions included within a qualifying master netting agreement; less the gross value of cash received and the gross fair value of securities received from the counterparty for those transactions (see the definition of 'qualifying master netting agreement' in 12 CFR 225; Appendix F; section 2). The net value

item_name: PREFERRED SHARES AND OTHER FORMS OF SUBORDINATED FUNDING NOT CAPTURED IN ITEM 15
description: Report the value of outstanding preferred shares and other forms of subordinated funding not captured in item 13 (e.g.; savings shares and silent partnerships). For publicly traded shares; report the closing share price multiplied by the number of shares outstanding on that day. Do not report non- publicly traded shares.

item_name: TRADING AND AFS SECURITIES THAT MEET THE DEFINITION OF LEVEL 1 ASSETS
description: Report the fair value of all trading and AFS securities that qualify as Level 1 assets according to paragraphs 50(c); 50(d) and 50(e) of the Basel III liquidity coverage ratio (LCR) (see Basel III: The Liquidity Coverage Ratio and liquidity risk monitoring tools; available at www.bis.org/publ/bcbs238.pdf). Include qualifying securities even if they do not fulfill the LCR operational requirements outlined in paragraphs 31-40.

item_name: TRADING AND AFS SECURITIES THAT MEET THE DEFINITION OF LEVEL 2 ASSETS; WITH HAIRCUTS
description: Report the fair value; after applying haircuts; of all trading and AFS securities that qualify as Level 2 assets according to paragraphs 52 and 54 of the Basel III LCR (see Basel III: The Liquidity Coverage Ratio and liquidity risk monitoring tools; available at www.bis.org/publ/bcbs238.pdf). Include qualifying securities even if they do not fulfill the LCR operational requirements outlined in paragraphs 31- 40. Level 2A; Level 2B RMBS; and Level 2B non-RMBS assets should be reported with haircu

item_name: DERIVATIVE EXPOSURES: GROSS-UP FOR DERIVATIVES COLLATERAL
DERIVATIVE EXPOSURES: CASH VARIATION MARGIN INCLUDED AS AN ON-BALANCE SHEET RECEIVABLE
DERIVATIVE EXPOSURES: EXEMPTED CENTRAL COUNTERPARTY LEGS OF CLIENTS-CLEARED TRANSACTIONS INCLUDED IN ITEM 3(A)
DERIVATIVE EXPOSURES: EFFECTIVE NOTIONAL AMOUNT OFFSETS AND PFE ADJUSTMENTS FOR SOLD CREDIT PROTECTION
DERIVATIVE EXPOSURES: TOTAL DERIVATIVE EXPOSURES (SUM OF ITEMS 1.A THROUGH 1.D; MINUS THE SUM OF ITEMS 1.E THROUGH 1.G)
description: the sum of items 1.a; 1.b; 1.c and 1.d minus the sum of items 1.e; 1.f; and 1.g

item_name: SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTION (SFT) EXPOSURES: SFT INDEMNIFICATION AND OTHER AGENT-RELATED EXPOSURES
SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTION (SFT) EXPOSURES: GROSS VALUE OF OFFSETTING CASH PAYABLES
SECURITIES FINANCING TRANSACTION (SFT) EXPOSURES: TOTAL SFT EXPOSURES (SUM OF ITEMS 2.A THROUGH 2.C; MINUS ITEM 2.D)
description: the sum of items 2.a; 2.b and 2.c minus item 2.d

item_name: OTHER ON-BALANCE SHEET EXPOSURES: OTHER ON-BALANCE SHEET ASSETS
OTHER OFF-BALANCE SHEET EXPOSURES: CREDIT EXPOSURE EQUIVALENT OF OTHER OFF-BALANCE SHEET ITEMS (SUM OF 0.1 TIMES ITEM 4.A; 0.2 TIMES ITEM 4.B; 0.5 TIMES ITEM 4.C; AND ITEM 4.D)
description: the sum of 0.1 times item 4.a; 0.2 times item 4.b; 0.5 times item 4.c; and item 4.d

item_name: TOTAL EXPOSURES PRIOR TO REGULATORY DEDUCTIONS (SUM OF ITEMS 1.H; 2.E; 3.A; AND 4.E)
description: the sum of items 1.h; 2.e; 3.a; and 4.e

item_name: BORROWINGS OBTAINED FROM OTHER FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
STANDBY LETTERS OF CREDIT EXTENDED TO OTHER FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS

description: Furthermore; the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision (BCBS) has identified three additional currencies that may be important in measuring the overall substitutability of a firm: Mexican pesos; New Zealand dollars; and Russian rubles.
